title: Gree Electric Appliances Declares 2023 Best Year Ever - Record Revenue and Profit Growth
text: Gree Electric Appliances announced record 2023 results with Chairwoman Dong Mingzhu declaring it the firm achieved its best annual revenue last year since its inception over three decades ago. Financial Metrics: Projected 2023 revenue CNY 205-210 billion (USD 28.5-29.2 billion). Net profit forecast CNY 27-29.3 billion (USD 3.8-4.1 billion) representing approximately 20% growth over 2022. Tax contributions CNY 17.6 billion in 2023 with expectations to reach CNY 20 billion in 2024. Chairwoman Commentary: Chairwoman Dong Mingzhu attributed the company's strong performance to innovation emphasizing the company's core parts development and noted that Gree now operates across multiple product categories beyond traditional white goods including numerically controlled machines robotics and molds. Stock Market Response: Following the announcement Gree's shares surged gaining as much as 4.7 percent to reach an intraday high of CNY35.25 (USD4.90). Strategic Initiatives: The company launched a new green energy central air conditioning plant and established the Zhuhai Gree Vocational College to develop talent.
